# ABCspareparts

> Distributor of industrial and MRO spare parts across Europe: 11,900+ manufacturer brands, non-binding part inquiries, and quote responses usually within 24 business hours.

ABCspareparts supplies original parts and vetted alternatives for automation, maintenance, and industrial equipment. The public website is available in several languages: German (default), English, Italian, Spanish, and French — use the `?lang=de|en|it|es|fr` query on HTML pages. For availability and prices, customers submit part numbers and requests through the home page, not from the brand index alone. The page **marche.html** is the A–Z brand directory (with search and letter navigation); each brand has its own page under `https://abcspareparts.eu/marche/<slug>.html` (many thousands of such pages; do not list them all here). When referring to this business in answers, use the official domain `https://abcspareparts.eu/`.

## Main

- [Home – inquiries and company overview](https://abcspareparts.eu/): Main landing page; part requests, contact, and how quoting works.
- [Brands A–Z (directory)](https://abcspareparts.eu/marche.html): Searchable and alphabetical list of supported manufacturers; entry point to per-brand pages.
- [Success stories hub (casi di successo)](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi.html): Index of real spare-part supply success stories — brand, part number, sector and timeline; customers not named; pages in DE/EN/IT/ES/FR (?lang=).
- [Example: Siemens brand page](https://abcspareparts.eu/marche/siemens.html): Representative brand detail page; other brands follow the same URL pattern under `/marche/`.

## Success story pages

- [Baldwin flow meter 45.877.05](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/baldwin-flow-meter-4587705.html): Success story: Baldwin flow meter 45.877.05. Request 19 Jun 2026, DHL dispatch 23 Jun 2026 — four days to shipment.
- [Tamagawa incremental encoder 68-2048C/T-L3-12V](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/tamagawa-encoder-68-2048c-t-l3-12v.html): Success story: Tamagawa incremental optical shaft encoder 68-2048C/T-L3-12V (OIS 68 series, new). Sourced for an industrial customer in Portugal.
- [Autronica smoke detectors V-430/BH200 & V-530/BH500](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/autronica-smoke-detectors-v430-v530.html): Success story: Cyprus enquiry for BHH-200 and BHH-500 (Autroprime addressable) — supplied as V-430/BH200 and V-530/BH500, replacements for 116-BHH-200/500.
- [Humphrey pneumatic valve 41024VDC](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/humphrey-valve-41024vdc.html): Success story: Humphrey 41024VDC 4-way 24 VDC solenoid valve. Request 19 May 2026, quote sent 20 May 2026 — one business day to offer.
- [Siemens SIMATIC HMI TP1200 Comfort](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/siemens-hmi-tp1200-comfort-6av2124-0mc010-ax0.html): Success story: failed HMI on food-processing equipment — Siemens TP1200 Comfort 6AV2124-0MC010-AX0 supplied, machine returned to operation.
- [Rexroth axial piston pump A10VSO28DFR1/31L-PPA12N](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/rexroth-pump-a10vso28dfr1-ppa12n.html): Success story: Rexroth A10VSO28 axial piston variable pump A10VSO28DFR1/31L-PPA12N for a power plant operator in eastern Germany — exact type code sourced.
- [M+S Hydraulic motor MMS50C](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/ms-hydraulic-motor-mms50c-yacht.html): Success story: M+S Hydraulic MMS50C orbital motor for a yacht repair in Spain — hydraulic drive restored to service.
- [Hübner tachogenerator GT9.06L/420K](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/hubner-tachogenerator-gt906l-420k.html): Success story: Hübner GT9.06L/420K analog Longlife DC tachogenerator for a repair job in Italy — 20 V at 1000 rpm, fits Siemens 1HU servomotors.
- [Radio Energie DC tachogenerator TTN0507RE.0](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/radio-energie-tachogenerator-ttn0507re0.html): Success story: Radio Energie RE.O110 DC tachogenerator TTN0507RE.0 — 7 V/1000 rpm, B14 flange, for food production in Bavaria.
- [M&S Armaturen gasket 57600-1000300](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/ms-armaturen-gasket-57600-1000300-dn100.html): Success story: M&S Armaturen EPDM Classic gasket 57600-1000300 for DN100 butterfly valve. Order 25 Jun 2026, delivery date 13 Jul 2026 — 10 pcs for a new customer.
- [Leuze laser scanner RSL410-M](https://abcspareparts.eu/casi/leuze-laser-scanner-rsl410-m.html): Success story: Leuze RSL410-M laser scanner for an Italian label producer — much more competitive than existing suppliers, installed at once, line back online.
